canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>circuit</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #000; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Audio setup
const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
let audioStarted = false;

// Oscillator pool for signal sounds
function playSignalTone(freq, duration = 0.1) {
  if (!audioStarted) return;
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  osc.type = 'square';
  osc.frequency.value = freq;
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.03, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.exponentialDecayTo?.(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + duration) || 
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
  osc.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
}

// Background hum
let humOsc, humGain;
function startHum() {
  humOsc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  humGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  humOsc.type = 'sawtooth';
  humOsc.frequency.value = 60;
  humGain.gain.value = 0.008;
  humOsc.connect(humGain);
  humGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  humOsc.start();
}

// Grid settings
const GRID = 20;
const TRACE_WIDTH = 3;

// PCB elements
let nodes = [];
let traces = [];
let components = [];
let signals = [];
let sparks = [];

// Component types
const COMP_TYPES = ['chip', 'capacitor', 'led', 'resistor', 'via'];

function gridSnap(v) {
  return Math.round(v / GRID) * GRID;
}

function dist(a, b) {
  return Math.sqrt((a.x - b.x) ** 2 + (a.y - b.y) ** 2);
}

// Generate a PCB layout
function generatePCB() {
  nodes = [];
  traces = [];
  components = [];
  signals = [];
  
  const cols = Math.floor(W / GRID);
  const rows = Math.floor(H / GRID);
  
  // Create a grid of potential nodes
  const nodeGrid = [];
  for (let y = 2; y < rows - 2; y++) {
    for (let x = 2; x < cols - 2; x++) {
      if (Math.random() < 0.15) {
        nodeGrid.push({ x: x * GRID, y: y * GRID, connections: [] });
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Place components at some nodes
  const componentNodes = nodeGrid.filter(() => Math.random() < 0.3);
  componentNodes.forEach(n => {
    const type = COMP_TYPES[Math.floor(Math.random() * COMP_TYPES.length)];
    components.push({
      x: n.x,
      y: n.y,
      type,
      charge: 0,
      active: false,
      pins: type === 'chip' ? 8 : type === 'capacitor' ? 2 : type === 'led' ? 2 : type === 'resistor' ? 2 : 1
    });
  });
  
  nodes = nodeGrid;
  
  // Create traces between nearby nodes (routing)
  for (let i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
    const n1 = nodes[i];
    // Find 1-3 nearby nodes to connect
    const nearby = nodes
      .map((n2, j) => ({ node: n2, idx: j, d: dist(n1, n2) }))
      .filter(o => o.idx !== i && o.d < GRID * 8 && o.d > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => a.d - b.d)
      .slice(0, Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) + 1);
    
    nearby.forEach(o => {
      // Check if trace already exists
      const exists = traces.some(t => 
        (t.from === i && t.to === o.idx) || (t.from === o.idx && t.to === i)
      );
      if (!exists) {
        // Route with one bend (L-shaped)
        const midX = Math.random() < 0.5 ? n1.x : o.node.x;
        const midY = midX === n1.x ? o.node.y : n1.y;
        traces.push({
          from: i,
          to: o.idx,
          points: [
            { x: n1.x, y: n1.y },
            { x: midX, y: midY },
            { x: o.node.x, y: o.node.y }
          ],
          layer: Math.random() < 0.3 ? 'power' : Math.random() < 0.5 ? 'ground' : 'signal'
        });
      }
    });
  }
}

// Signal class - pulses that travel along traces
class Signal {
  constructor(traceIdx, direction = 1) {
    this.traceIdx = traceIdx;
    this.progress = direction === 1 ? 0 : 1;
    this.direction = direction;
    this.speed = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.02;
    this.alive = true;
    this.intensity = 1;
  }
  
  update() {
    this.progress += this.speed * this.direction;
    if (this.progress >= 1 || this.progress <= 0) {
      this.alive = false;
      // Trigger component if at endpoint
      const trace = traces[this.traceIdx];
      const endNode = this.direction === 1 ? trace.to : trace.from;
      const comp = components.find(c => 
        Math.abs(c.x - nodes[endNode].x) < GRID && 
        Math.abs(c.y - nodes[endNode].y) < GRID
      );
      if (comp) {
        comp.active = true;
        comp.charge = Math.min(1, comp.charge + 0.3);
        if (comp.type === 'led') {
          playSignalTone(800 + Math.random() * 400, 0.05);
        }
      }
      // Chance to spawn new signals on connected traces
      const connectedTraces = traces
        .map((t, i) => ({ t, i }))
        .filter(o => o.i !== this.traceIdx && (o.t.from === endNode || o.t.to === endNode));
      connectedTraces.forEach(o => {
        if (Math.random() < 0.6) {
          const dir = o.t.from === endNode ? 1 : -1;
          signals.push(new Signal(o.i, dir));
        }
      });
    }
  }
  
  getPosition() {
    const trace = traces[this.traceIdx];
    const pts = trace.points;
    const totalLen = pts.reduce((acc, p, i) => {
      if (i === 0) return 0;
      return acc + dist(pts[i-1], p);
    }, 0);
    let targetDist = this.progress * totalLen;
    
    for (let i = 1; i < pts.length; i++) {
      const segLen = dist(pts[i-1], pts[i]);
      if (targetDist <= segLen) {
        const t = targetDist / segLen;
        return {
          x: pts[i-1].x + (pts[i].x - pts[i-1].x) * t,
          y: pts[i-1].y + (pts[i].y - pts[i-1].y) * t
        };
      }
      targetDist -= segLen;
    }
    return pts[pts.length - 1];
  }
}

// Spark particles for surges
class Spark {
  constructor(x, y) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
    this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8;
    this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8;
    this.life = 1;
    this.decay = 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03;
  }
  
  update() {
    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;
    this.vx *= 0.95;
    this.vy *= 0.95;
    this.life -= this.decay;
  }
}

// Mouse state
let mouse = { x: W/2, y: H/2 };
canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mouse.x = e.clientX;
  mouse.y = e.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', e => {
  if (!audioStarted) {
    audioStarted = true;
    audioCtx.resume();
    startHum();
  }
  
  // Power surge - spawn signals on many traces
  const surgeCount = Math.floor(traces.length * 0.3);
  for (let i = 0; i < surgeCount; i++) {
    const idx = Math.floor(Math.random() * traces.length);
    signals.push(new Signal(idx, Math.random() < 0.5 ? 1 : -1));
  }
  
  // Sparks at click point
  for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
    sparks.push(new Spark(e.clientX, e.clientY));
  }
  
  playSignalTone(150, 0.3);
});

// Initialize
generatePCB();

// Spawn initial signals
for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
  const idx = Math.floor(Math.random() * traces.length);
  signals.push(new Signal(idx));
}

// Colors
const CYAN = '#00ffff';
const PINK = '#ff69b4';
const PURPLE = '#9932cc';
const DARK_PURPLE = '#1a0a2e';

function drawTrace(trace, glow = 0) {
  const pts = trace.points;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(pts[0].x, pts[0].y);
  for (let i = 1; i < pts.length; i++) {
    ctx.lineTo(pts[i].x, pts[i].y);
  }
  
  let color;
  if (trace.layer === 'power') color = PINK;
  else if (trace.layer === 'ground') color = PURPLE;
  else color = CYAN;
  
  if (glow > 0) {
    ctx.shadowColor = color;
    ctx.shadowBlur = 10 + glow * 20;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = TRACE_WIDTH + glow * 3;
  } else {
    ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color + '40';
    ctx.lineWidth = TRACE_WIDTH;
  }
  ctx.lineCap = 'round';
  ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
  ctx.stroke();
  ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
}

function drawComponent(comp) {
  const { x, y, type, charge, active } = comp;
  const glow = charge > 0 ? charge * 15 : 0;
  
  ctx.save();
  if (glow > 0) {
    ctx.shadowColor = type === 'led' ? PINK : CYAN;
    ctx.shadowBlur = glow;
  }
  
  ctx.strokeStyle = active ? CYAN : CYAN + '60';
  ctx.fillStyle = active ? (type === 'led' ? PINK : DARK_PURPLE) : '#0a0515';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  
  switch(type) {
    case 'chip':
      ctx.fillRect(x - 20, y - 15, 40, 30);
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 20, y - 15, 40, 30);
      // Pins
      for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = CYAN + (active ? 'ff' : '40');
        ctx.fillRect(x - 18 + i * 10, y - 20, 4, 5);
        ctx.fillRect(x - 18 + i * 10, y + 15, 4, 5);
      }
      break;
    case 'capacitor':
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.stroke();
      // Polarity mark
      ctx.fillStyle = PINK;
      ctx.fillRect(x - 1, y - 6, 2, 4);
      break;
    case 'led':
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(x - 8, y - 8);
      ctx.lineTo(x + 8, y);
      ctx.lineTo(x - 8, y + 8);
      ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.stroke();
      if (active && charge > 0.2) {
        // LED glow
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(x + 5, y, 20 * charge, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = PINK + Math.floor(charge * 80).toString(16).padStart(2, '0');
        ctx.fill();
      }
      break;
    case 'resistor':
      ctx.fillRect(x - 12, y - 5, 24, 10);
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 12, y - 5, 24, 10);
      // Color bands
      const bands = [PINK, PURPLE, CYAN];
      bands.forEach((c, i) => {
        ctx.fillStyle = c;
        ctx.fillRect(x - 8 + i * 6, y - 5, 3, 10);
      });
      break;
    case 'via':
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = active ? CYAN : '#333';
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.strokeStyle = PINK;
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
      ctx.fill();
      break;
  }
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawSignal(sig) {
  const pos = sig.getPosition();
  const trace = traces[sig.traceIdx];
  const color = trace.layer === 'power' ? PINK : trace.layer === 'ground' ? PURPLE : CYAN;
  
  // Glow
  const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(pos.x, pos.y, 0, pos.x, pos.y, 20);
  gradient.addColorStop(0, color);
  gradient.addColorStop(0.5, color + '40');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
  
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, 20, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
  ctx.fill();
  
  // Core
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
  ctx.fill();
}

function drawSpark(spark) {
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(spark.x, spark.y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${spark.life})`;
  ctx.fill();
}

// Background grid pattern (subtle PCB substrate)
function drawSubstrate() {
  ctx.fillStyle = '#050510';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Solder mask pattern
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#0a0a20';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (let x = 0; x < W; x += GRID) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x, 0);
    ctx.lineTo(x, H);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  for (let y = 0; y < H; y += GRID) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, y);
    ctx.lineTo(W, y);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  // Ground plane fills (large background areas)
  ctx.fillStyle = PURPLE + '08';
  for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    const px = Math.random() * W;
    const py = Math.random() * H;
    const pw = 100 + Math.random() * 200;
    const ph = 100 + Math.random() * 200;
    ctx.fillRect(px, py, pw, ph);
  }
}

// Mouse proximity creates interference
function getInterference(x, y) {
  const d = dist({ x, y }, mouse);
  return Math.max(0, 1 - d / 200);
}

let time = 0;

function animate() {
  time++;
  
  drawSubstrate();
  
  // Calculate trace glow based on nearby signals
  const traceGlow = traces.map((t, i) => {
    const nearSignals = signals.filter(s => s.traceIdx === i);
    return nearSignals.length > 0 ? 0.5 + nearSignals.length * 0.3 : 0;
  });
  
  // Draw traces
  traces.forEach((trace, i) => {
    // Mouse interference effect
    const midPt = trace.points[Math.floor(trace.points.length / 2)];
    const interference = getInterference(midPt.x, midPt.y);
    drawTrace(trace, traceGlow[i] + interference * 0.5);
  });
  
  // Draw nodes (solder points)
  nodes.forEach(n => {
    const interference = getInterference(n.x, n.y);
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(n.x, n.y, 3 + interference * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = interference > 0.3 ? PINK : CYAN + '60';
    ctx.fill();
  });
  
  // Draw components
  components.forEach(c => {
    c.charge *= 0.95; // Decay
    if (c.charge < 0.01) c.active = false;
    drawComponent(c);
  });
  
  // Update and draw signals
  signals.forEach(s => {
    s.update();
    if (s.alive) drawSignal(s);
  });
  signals = signals.filter(s => s.alive);
  
  // Randomly spawn new signals
  if (Math.random() < 0.02 && signals.length < 50) {
    const idx = Math.floor(Math.random() * traces.length);
    signals.push(new Signal(idx));
  }
  
  // Update and draw sparks
  sparks.forEach(s => {
    s.update();
    if (s.life > 0) drawSpark(s);
  });
  sparks = sparks.filter(s => s.life > 0);
  
  // Mouse cursor glow (interference field)
  const mouseGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(mouse.x, mouse.y, 0, mouse.x, mouse.y, 150);
  mouseGrad.addColorStop(0, PINK + '20');
  mouseGrad.addColorStop(0.5, PURPLE + '10');
  mouseGrad.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(mouse.x, mouse.y, 150, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fillStyle = mouseGrad;
  ctx.fill();
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
